results.title: Nintama Rantarou's Theater Troupe: Dorm Stories ~5th years, Yesterday, Today, and Tomorrow~
results.original_title: 劇団「忍たま乱太郎」長屋物語 ～五年生、きのうも今日もあしたもの段～
results.overview: This is the story of "a certain three days" in their everyday life that seemed like nothing but was special.  Would you like to take a peek into their lives as they laugh with their friends and grow a little?

results.title: The Hurricane Drummer
results.overview: A Japansese film from 1967, starring Tetsuya Watari.

results.title: Hitch-Hike
results.overview: A middle-aged man sits on a bench at the airport, his laptop open and enjoying a chat. Sugata Toshio, who works for an insurance company, has left Tokyo and is on a solo assignment in Hokkaido as a branch manager. Today is the day his wife, Reiko, is coming from Tokyo for the first time in six months. While waiting for his wife's arrival, he enjoys chatting with the person he's having an affair with—a subordinate at his company. Reiko, is a tall, slender, young, and hot woman. The Sugata couple are reunited after a long time, but there is no nostalgia or joy on their faces...

results.title: Midarazuma
results.overview: The story of an indecent man, Fumio, who cheats on his fiancee with an office girl named Kiyo.

results.title: Tiger & Dragon Special
results.original_title: タイガー&ドラゴン スペシャル
results.overview: The prequel to the TV series "Tiger and Dragon" broadcast as a two-hour special before the series.

results.title: The Visas That Saved Lives
results.overview: Dramatization of the true story of Chiune Sugihara, a Japanese diplomat who saved thousands of Lithuanian Jews during World War II by granting them visas, though it cost him his own career.

results.title: Nintama Rantarou 13th Musical: ~Welcome to The Nintama's Cultural Festival!~
results.original_title: ミュージカル「忍たま乱太郎」第13弾〜ようこそ！忍たま文化祭！〜
results.overview: The school principal suddenly came up with an idea and suddenly decided to hold a cultural festival. Immediately, they started preparing in a hurry, mainly with the 6th graders, but they didn't have the time or the budget! What will they do at the cultural festival!? Fourth graders, fifth graders, and teachers can't agree on anything at all! At that time, the school principal came up with an idea, so now that’s tough! Can they really do that!? The 13th Ninmyu, in which seniors and juniors work together to create a wonderful school festival, is a lot of fun!! Come on! Grab your invitation and go to the Ninjutsu Gakuen's school festival!

results.title: Stardom Cinderella Tournament 2026 ~Second Round~
results.overview: Cinderella Tournament 2026 ~Second Round~ was a professional wrestling event promoted by World Wonder Ring Stardom, held on March 8, 2026, at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan. It primarily focused on second round matches for the company's annual single-elimination tournament, as well as other featured bouts.

results.title: Vivarium
results.overview: Ado's Vivarium short music film. This is an accompany to the book about Ado that is titled "Vivarium: Ado and I"

results.title: Nintama Rantarou 14th Musical: Fifth Grade! Vs. Sixth Grade! ~Find The Treasure!!~
results.original_title: ミュージカル「忍たま乱太郎」第14弾　五年生！対六年生！～お宝を探し出せ!!～
results.overview: The headmaster suddenly came up with the idea of having the fifth and sixth graders compete against each other in a showdown of their abilities! The winner is the one who finds the treasure that has been decided upon, and the three chosen for the treasure are first-year students Rantaro, Kirimaru, and Shinbee. Finally, the showdown between the sparking fifth and sixth graders began, but a suspicious shadow was approaching the treasured first grader...

results.title: Dragon Ball: 40th Anniversary Special Video
results.original_title: 『DRAGON BALL』40周年記念スペシャル映像
results.overview: Akira Toriyama’s color illustrations and standout scenes will come to life as an animation using the latest techniques!  The animation was completed with a strong focus on faithfully translating the textures and colors of Akira Toriyama’s illustrations into motion, resulting in dynamic visuals that express Son Goku’s growth and journey.
